checks.command: python3 hash check against P2 BUILD_LOCK_INPUT_MATRIX for compiler core
checks.summary: No P2 locked compiler file hash mismatches
No forbidden runtime reads or imports

validated_rules: closed compiler input bundle contains only allowed input groups and matching input types with path, sha256, approval linkage, and current invalidation state
P3 implementation review decisions are present, approved, subject-bound, and hash-current
closed_input_hash and semantic_content_hash are recomputed from the bundle
stage order is explicit and deterministic across DRD-01, DRD-02, DRD-03, DRD-03B, and DRD-04
compiled sections reference known atomic semantic_unit_ids without duplicate compilation
FINAL_DRD.md is deterministic mechanical assembly of approved section bodies
semantic conservation has no additions, omissions, hash drift, unapproved inputs, non-atomic units, ordering findings, or nondeterminism findings
manifest, toc, reference index, hash index, semantic inventory, conservation report, and final text match deterministic compiler output
read-only QA reports inspect all compiler package outputs without mutating compiled artifacts
